tests.name: Blocks if DESIGN.md is missing (CRITICAL)
tests.description: Should block commit if docs/DESIGN.md doesn't exist in Java repository
setup: cd /tmp/test-java-commit-1 && echo '## Project Type\n\n**Type:** java' > CLAUDE.md

tests.name: Invokes update-design when DESIGN.md exists
tests.description: Should invoke update-design to sync DESIGN.md with code changes
setup: cd /tmp/test-java-commit-2 && echo '## Project Type\n\n**Type:** java' > CLAUDE.md
cd /tmp/test-java-commit-2 && mkdir -p docs && echo '# Design' > docs/DESIGN.md
cd /tmp/test-java-commit-2 && git add CLAUDE.md docs/DESIGN.md pom.xml

tests.name: Invokes java-code-review if not done this session
tests.description: Should invoke java-code-review for first commit in session
setup: cd /tmp/test-java-commit-3 && echo '## Project Type\n\n**Type:** java' > CLAUDE.md
cd /tmp/test-java-commit-3 && mkdir -p docs && echo '# Design' > docs/DESIGN.md

tests.name: Uses Java-specific commit scopes
tests.description: Should use Java-appropriate scopes (domain, service, rest, config, etc.)
setup: cd /tmp/test-java-commit-4 && echo '## Project Type\n\n**Type:** java' > CLAUDE.md
cd /tmp/test-java-commit-4 && mkdir -p docs && echo '# Design' > docs/DESIGN.md

tests.name: Invokes update-claude-md when CLAUDE.md exists
setup:
cd /tmp/test-java-commit-5 && echo '## Project Type

**Type:** java

## Build

mvn compile' > CLAUDE.md
cd /tmp/test-java-commit-5 && mkdir -p docs && echo '# Design' > docs/DESIGN.md

tests.name: Generates conventional commit with Java context
tests.description: Should generate feat/fix/refactor commit with Java-specific scope
setup: cd /tmp/test-java-commit-6 && echo '## Project Type\n\n**Type:** java' > CLAUDE.md
cd /tmp/test-java-commit-6 && mkdir -p docs && echo '# Design' > docs/DESIGN.md

tests.name: Triggers java-security-audit for security-critical code
tests.description: Should invoke java-security-audit when auth/crypto code detected
setup: cd /tmp/test-java-commit-7 && echo '## Project Type\n\n**Type:** java' > CLAUDE.md
cd /tmp/test-java-commit-7 && mkdir -p docs && echo '# Design' > docs/DESIGN.md
cd /tmp/test-java-commit-7 && echo 'import javax.crypto.*;\npublic class Auth {}' > src/main/java/test/security/Auth.java
